overall.description: A cinematic scene from a fantasy video game depicting a gothic council chamber with a large circular wooden table. Several characters are seated in discussion around the table while warm chandelier light illuminates the blue walls and arched stained-glass windows. A new character enters from the left and joins the gathering.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic council chamber with circular meeting table

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the council chamber from a fixed position near the table

notable_agents.action: seated at the table, engaged in discussion with others
seated at the head of the circular table, presiding over the meeting

entered.detail: large circular table with ornate wood carvings and glowing runes along the edge
tall pointed arch windows with intricate stained glass and stone tracery
elaborate hanging chandeliers with multiple candle-style lights providing warm illumination
tall wooden bookshelves filled with books against the blue wall
portrait paintings in ornate frames hanging on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a grand gothic council chamber with deep blue walls and gold trim. A large circular wooden table dominates the center, surrounded by seated characters engaged in discussion. Warm light from ornate chandeliers illuminates the stained-glass windows in the background, while bookshelves and framed paintings line the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic council chamber with circular meeting table

events.description: a new character enters the chamber from the left doorway and walks toward the table

agents.ego_description: watching the entrance of a new participant into the council chamber

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes entering from the left and walking toward an empty seat at the table

segments.scene_description: A character dressed in dark academic robes enters from the left side of the chamber and walks purposefully toward the circular table. The seated members remain in discussion as the new arrival approaches an empty chair. The camera maintains its fixed position, capturing the movement across the polished marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic council chamber with circular meeting table

events.description: the entering character sits down at the table, joining the ongoing discussion

agents.ego_description: observing the newly seated character settling into the meeting

notable_agents.action: character who just entered is now seated and adjusting their position at the table

segments.scene_description: The entering character takes their seat at the left side of the circular table, completing the gathering. The scene returns to a static composition with all participants now seated and engaged in the council meeting. The warm chandelier light continues to illuminate the gothic architecture and stained-glass windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static view of a grand gothic council chamber as a solitary figure enters to complete a gathering of seated delegates. It begins with a wide view of the room, where warm chandelier light illuminates deep blue walls, gold trim, and ornate stained-glass windows surrounding a large circular wooden table. As the scene unfolds, a character in dark academic robes enters from the left and walks purposefully across the polished marble floor toward the group. The camera remains fixed as the newcomer approaches an empty chair, shifting the focus from the ongoing discussion to the arrival. Finally, the character takes their seat at the left side of the table, returning the composition to a balanced, static tableau of all participants engaged in the meeting.
